name: Vanilla-Nutmeg Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:45
1. Butter and flour a 12-cup tube pan. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Sift together the cake flour, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg.
3. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time,
beating well after each egg is added. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. Alternately add half of the sifted flour mixture and 1 cup of buttermilk
to the butter-sugar mixture, then the remaining flour mixture and the rest
of the buttermilk.
5. Pour batter into prepared tube pan. Bake until a wooden skewer inserted
2 inches from the edge comes out clean (about 1 hour and 5 minutes).
6. Cool cake in pan for 10 to 15 minutes, then invert onto a cooling rack.
Remove pan and allow cake to cool completely before serving.
7. Dust with confectioners' sugar before serving.
